creator: georg-bsd@schorsch-tech.de
text:
Created attachment 195037
patch from HardenedBSD/hardenedbsd-ports to build with libressl 2.7.4

security/py-cryptography: 2.1.4 fails to build with current LibreSSL 2.7.4. See additional patch. 

It is taken from 
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/HardenedBSD/hardenedbsd-ports/dcf62dd3c1721d4b8d9cd7187a996e2a63e3bfda/security/py-cryptography/files/patch-issue4168

With this patch branches/2018Q3@474379 and svn_head@474396 builds ok.
